inputs.label: Monthly Essential Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total essential monthly living expenses (e.g., housing, food, utilities, transportation, insurance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total essential monthly living expenses (e.g., housing, food, utilities, transportation, insurance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık temel yaşam giderleri toplamı (örneğin, konut, gıda, faturalar, ulaşım, sigorta).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte monatliche Lebenshaltungskosten (z. B. Wohnen, Essen, Nebenkosten, Transport, Versicherung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des dépenses mensuelles essentielles (ex. logement, alimentation, services publics, transport, assurance).
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos esenciales mensuales totales (p. ej., vivienda, alimentación, servicios públicos, transporte, seguros).

inputs.label: Desired Coverage (Months)
inputs.businessContext: Number of months of expenses the emergency fund should cover (typically 3-6).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months of expenses the emergency fund should cover (typically 3-6).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Acil durum fonunun karşılaması gereken ay sayısı (genellikle 3-6).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Monate, die der Notfallfonds abdecken soll (normalerweise 3–6).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mois de dépenses que le fonds d'urgence doit couvrir (généralement 3 à 6).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de meses de gastos que debe cubrir el fondo de emergencia (generalmente 3-6).

inputs.label: Current Emergency Savings
inputs.businessContext: Amount already saved toward the emergency fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount already saved toward the emergency fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Acil durum fonu için halihazırda biriktirilen miktar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bereits für den Notfallfonds gesparter Betrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant déjà épargné pour le fonds d'urgence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad ya ahorrada para el fondo de emergencia.

inputs.label: Safety Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage buffer for unforeseen costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage buffer for unforeseen costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öngörülemeyen maliyetler için ek yüzde tamponu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher prozentualer Puffer für unvorhergesehene Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire pour les coûts imprévus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional de margen para costos imprevistos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
